home.hero_subtitle: Discover Turkey's most beautiful bays sailing from Göcek
home.fleet_subtitle: Experience an unforgettable sea holiday aboard our carefully selected yachts
home.routes_subtitle: Explore the unique bays around Göcek
home.fleet_sub: Our growing catamaran fleet in Göcek — all Lagoon and Excess, 2022 and later models. Each boat undergoes an engineer inspection before every guest.
home.routes_sub: From Göcek to Kekova, four classic routes and endless alternatives. A new bay every holiday.
home.why_sub: The comfort of large charter chains combined with the warmth of a boutique operation.
home.feature_compass_text: Our captains know the Mediterranean like the back of their hand. We suggest a new route every week based on wind, crowds and your experience.
home.feature_anchor_text: Service pack included. Fuel, marina and extras are clear before booking. No surprises, no hidden charges.
home.feature_users_text: Fatih and his team on a 24/7 support line. When you call with a problem, it's solved within an hour.
home.feature_map_text: Departures from Göcek Marina and D-Marin Göcek. We plan the most convenient marina for your flight.
home.feature_star_text: All 2022 and later Lagoon 42 and Excess 11 catamarans. Annual maintenance and upgrades.
home.feature_chat_text: TR, EN, DE and RU. No matter which country you're from, get service in your own language.
home.charter_title: What kind of captain do you want to be?
home.charter_bareboat_desc: Sail the boat yourself with a valid captain's licence. You set the route, you discover the bays.
home.charter_skipperli_desc: Let our experienced captain introduce you to the most beautiful bays. Reach hidden coves with our local knowledge.
home.charter_full_service_desc: A sea holiday with full hotel comfort — captain, hostess and optional chef. Every detail taken care of.
home.cta_sub: Exclusive for guests booking before end of April. Limited availability.
home.newsletter_title: Be the first to hear about seasonal offers
home.newsletter_sub: Once a month, travel guides and exclusive deals. No spam.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The NonnoBlue family is passionate about the sea
about.story_sub: A family story that started with one catamaran in Göcek in 2020 and grew into a fleet of 4.
about.cta_sub: Get in touch with us for a journey starting from Göcek.
about.story_heading: A maritime culture bearing our grandfather's name
about.story_p1: "Nonno" means grandfather in Italian. Mehmet's grandfather was a fisherman in İzmir — we learned from him the sea, every detail of a boat, and the art of hospitality.
about.story_p2: In 2020, in the middle of the pandemic, starting a new business took courage. We started with one catamaran. Today we sail with four — all 2021 and later Lagoon and Excess models — departing from Göcek and D-Marin. But more than the growth of our fleet, we're most proud when a guest returns the next season.
about.story_p3: Today we operate from Göcek Marina and D-Marin. With all the warmth of a family business and all the standards of a professional fleet.
about.value1_desc: We get to know you at the start of each season and plan your holiday together. No standard checklists.
about.value2_desc: A 40-point technical check before every departure. Full service at the start of each season.
about.value3_desc: We were born in Göcek and live here. We know which bay is free and when.

footer.tagline: Your gateway to the sea from Göcek

sss.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sss.subtitle: Answers to your questions
sss.page_sub: Find answers to everything you're curious about. If you can't find an answer, write to us directly.
sss.question_sub: If you can't find an answer here, you can reach us instantly via WhatsApp.
sss.q1_1: How can I make a reservation?
sss.a1_1: You can reach us via our website contact form, WhatsApp or email. Let us know your desired dates and boat type; we'll send you availability and a price quote within 24 hours.
sss.q1_2: What payment methods do you accept?
sss.a1_2: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfer/EFT, and iyzico secure online payment. Bank transfer is also available for international guests.
sss.a1_3: Cancellations made 60+ days before departure receive an 80% refund; 30–59 days prior receive 50%. For cancellations within 30 days, no refund is provided, but we offer flexible date change options.
sss.a1_4: For bareboat charter: a valid skipper's licence (ICC or equivalent), VHF radio licence and ID. For skippered charter, only a valid ID is required.
sss.q1_5: How much is the deposit and when is it returned?
sss.a1_5: The deposit ranges from €2,000–€3,000 depending on the boat, collected at check-in by credit card hold or cash. It is fully refunded on check-out day if the boat is returned undamaged.
sss.a2_1: All our boats undergo annual maintenance, mandatory safety inspections and full insurance. Life raft, life jackets, VHF radio, fire extinguisher and first-aid kit are always on board.
sss.q2_2: Can I rent if I have no sailing experience?
sss.a2_2: No problem! With our skippered charter option, our expert captain handles the boat — you just enjoy. We also offer instructional sails with the captain for those who want to learn.
sss.a2_3: Yes, all our boats are covered by full hull and third-party liability insurance. We also recommend that guests arrange their own personal travel insurance.
sss.a2_4: Small and medium-sized pets (especially dogs) are welcome on board. For larger animals, please contact us before booking. An additional cleaning fee may apply.
sss.q2_5: Do I need to provide my own food and drinks?
sss.a2_5: Provisioning is the guest's responsibility. Supermarkets near the marina make it easy to stock up. We also offer a chef service or pre-prepared provisioning packages — contact us for details.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join the NonnoBlue family
careers.hero_sub: We're looking for new talent every season at NonnoBlue. If you love working with the sea and people, you're in the right place.
careers.no_position_sub: Even if there are no open positions, you can send us your resume. We'll be the first to call you when a suitable position opens.
careers.p1_desc: Minimum 5 years of blue voyage experience, valid skipper's licence. Foreign language (English or German) preferred.
careers.p2_desc: Experienced in guest service, boat maintenance and service. Tourism or hospitality background preferred.
careers.p3_desc: Experience in boat charter industry, strong communication skills, CRM usage. English required, German/Russian a plus.
careers.p4_desc: SEO, social media management, Google Ads and content creation. Tourism sector experience is an advantage.
